untranslatable_reason: Horn Pattern requires multi-bar analysis across two separated spikes with matching lows and price overlap geometry. Exact low price matching (low == prev_low) and the comparative spike length analysis ('longer than similar spikes over prior year') cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicators. The inverted horn shape and 'good price overlap' require multi-candle spatial analysis not available in standard indicators. Pattern uses weekly timeframe which requires data transformation not native to engine.
